title: Explain a policy proposal
subtitle: Summarize what a proposal would do.
overview: Policy language needs measure, goal, affected groups, risk.

items.es: La propuesta consiste en reducir el precio del transporte público.
items.en: The proposal consists of reducing the price of public transport.

items.es: Su objetivo es disminuir el uso del coche en el centro.
items.en: Its goal is to reduce car use downtown.

items.es: Afectaría especialmente a estudiantes y trabajadores.
items.en: It would especially affect students and workers.

items.es: Uno de los riesgos es que el sistema se sature.
items.en: One of the risks is that the system becomes overloaded.

items.es: Por eso haría falta aumentar también la frecuencia de los servicios.
items.en: That is why it would also be necessary to increase service frequency.
